Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Clojure: The Documentary, official trailer [video] 134 upvotes, 8 comments
  2. Researchers find 3,500-year-old loom that reveals textile revolution 101 upvotes, 11 comments
  3. Agents of Chaos 96 upvotes, 11 comments
  4. OpenGridWorks: The Electricity Infrasctructure, Mapped 92 upvotes, 11 comments
  5. Unit: A self-replicating Forth mesh agent running in a browser tab 26 upvotes, 1 comments
  6. Oscar Reutersvärd (2021) 17 upvotes, 0 comments
  7. Cherri – programming language that compiles to an Apple Shortuct 290 upvotes, 58 comments
  8. Safeguarding cryptocurrency by disclosing quantum vulnerabilities responsibly 41 upvotes, 5 comments
  9. Axios compromised on NPM – Malicious versions drop remote access trojan 506 upvotes, 155 comments
  10. Fedware: Government apps that spy harder than the apps they ban 530 upvotes, 166 comments
  11. Show HN: I turned a sketch into a 3D-print pegboard for my kid with an AI agent 33 upvotes, 5 comments
  12. How to turn anything into a router 653 upvotes, 227 comments
  13. Rock Star: Reading the Rosetta Stone 9 upvotes, 0 comments
  14. Do your own writing 478 upvotes, 175 comments
  15. Ollama is now powered by MLX on Apple Silicon in preview 145 upvotes, 48 comments
  16. Universal Claude.md – cut Claude output tokens 245 upvotes, 93 comments
  17. Turning a MacBook into a touchscreen with $1 of hardware (2018) 285 upvotes, 132 comments
  18. CodingFont: A game to help you pick a coding font 388 upvotes, 193 comments
  19. GitHub backs down, kills Copilot pull-request ads after backlash 78 upvotes, 32 comments
  20. Incident March 30th, 2026 – Accidental CDN Caching 45 upvotes, 16 comments
  21. Sony halts memory card shipments due to NAND shortage 25 upvotes, 7 comments
  22. Artemis II is not safe to fly 209 upvotes, 124 comments
  23. Bird brains (2023) 313 upvotes, 195 comments
  24. Google's 200M-parameter time-series foundation model with 16k context 53 upvotes, 25 comments
  25. Mr. Chatterbox is a Victorian-era ethically trained model 28 upvotes, 11 comments
  26. Vulnerability research is cooked 154 upvotes, 107 comments
  27. Android Developer Verification 220 upvotes, 208 comments
  28. R3 Bio pitched “brainless clones” to serve the role of backup human bodies 49 upvotes, 61 comments
  29. One of the largest salt mines in the world exists under Lake Erie 8 upvotes, 5 comments
  30. Show HN: Raincast – Describe an app, get a native desktop app (open source) 10 upvotes, 14 comments

Last generated 3:00pm, 31 March 2026. Source here.
